title: digitaria aegyptiaca subsp. caucasica
intro: Digitaria aegyptiaca subsp. caucasica, also known as Caucasus finger grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the Caucasus region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Digitaria aegyptiaca subsp. caucasica include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
